imprint.privateProjectPlaceholder: [No information is provided because this is a private learning project.]
imprint.contentLiabilityText: As the operator of this website, we are responsible for our own content in accordance with Section 7 (1) DDG and general legislation. Under Sections 8 to 10 DDG, there is no obligation to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information.
imprint.trainingDisclaimer: This is a private learning project created by trainees.
imprint.linkLiabilityText: This website contains links to external third-party websites. We have no influence over their content and accept no liability for it. The respective operator is always responsible for the content of linked pages.
imprint.copyrightText: Content and works created by the operator are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, or distribution requires written consent.

privacy.controllerIntro: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
privacy.storedDataIntro: We store only the following personal data that you actively provide when registering for and using the app:
privacy.noTrackingText: We do not use tracking cookies, advertising networks, or analytics tools.
privacy.purposeIntro: We process your data exclusively to operate the application:
privacy.purposeList:
• Authentication and account management
  • Storage of your wheel entries per user
  • Security and prevention of misuse
privacy.legalBasisText: Legal basis: Article 6 (1) (b) GDPR (performance of a contract).
privacy.supabaseText: We use Supabase (Supabase Inc., 970 Trestle Glen Rd, Oakland, CA 94610, USA) as our database and authentication service. Your account data is stored on Supabase servers.
privacy.supabasePrivacyText: Supabase is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. For more information, see the Supabase Privacy Policy.
privacy.vercelText: This website is hosted by Vercel (Vercel Inc., 340 Pine Street Suite 701, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA). Technical server logs (IP address, timestamp, and requested URL) are generated when the website is accessed. Vercel stores these logs temporarily; we do not analyze them.
privacy.vercelPrivacyText: More information: Vercel Privacy Policy.
privacy.retentionText: Your data is stored for as long as your account remains active. After an account is deleted, all personal data is deleted within [30 days – adjust as required], unless statutory retention obligations apply.
privacy.rightsIntro: You have the right at any time to:
privacy.rightsList:
• Access your stored data (Article 15)
  • Rectification of inaccurate data (Article 16)
  • Erasure of your data (‘right to be forgotten’, Article 17)
  • Restriction of processing (Article 18)
  • Data portability (Article 20)
  • Object to processing (Article 21)
privacy.complaintText: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority. In North Rhine-Westphalia, this is the State Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information of North Rhine-Westphalia.
privacy.changesText: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy as necessary. The latest version is always available on this page.
